Content is excellent: component selection guides (Hall vs Reed, MOSFET selection, temp sensor selection) which align perfectly with MechatronicStore's component/sensor catalog.

Raspberry Pi AI HAT+ 2 Launched – Generative AI on the Pi 5
sources.notes: Bret Weber — SBC-focused reviews & getting-started guides (RK3576, RPi CM0, Allwinner). Reviews mostly but contains setup walkthroughs. Useful as adjunct to Raspberry Pi catalog. Treat as review/news; if pulled, filter for 'getting started', 'how to', 'first boot'.

sources.name: Embedded Artistry

A Practice: Satisfied on Purpose

sources.notes: Phillip Johnston — embedded firmware engineering practice posts. More advanced (Yocto, C++ patterns, testing practices) than the maker base audience usually wants, but valuable for ESP32-IDF / STM32 HAL audience segment. Filter for technical-tutorial posts only (skip 'A Practice: Satisfied on Purpose'-style philosophy posts).

sources.name: KiCad Blog

sources.notes: Official KiCad project blog (CERN-incubated, Linux Foundation hosted). Heavy on release notes (~3KB short posts) but periodic deep-dive tutorials on PCB workflow. 151 items in feed = full archive. Pairs well with MechatronicStore PCB customers + electronics-design audience. Note: NOT a tutorial-first site — filter for 'how to' / 'tutorial' / 'guide' tagged posts only.

sources.notes: China (Shenzhen). Blog oficial M5Stack. ~2/mes. Es ESSENTIALLY product launches + showcase de su ecosistema (StackChan, Cardputer, Nesso N1). NO es tutorial pero source ÚNICA para novedades M5Stack — productos que MechatronicStore podría stockar. Riesgo: 100% promo de su marca. Útil para sección 'novedades' o para alertar de nuevos productos para evaluar.
